summary: Iteration 27: Tested in-memory caching for external API proxy endpoints (sauna/public-models, sauna/prices) with 5-min TTL, settings/bulk endpoint enhancements (_stock_saunas, _catalog_available), and SeoHead.jsx TDZ fix. All features working correctly. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: /sauny and /balie pages load without critical errors, model cards display correctly, color tabs switch properly.

integration_issues.issue: Legacy endpoint /api/content/calculator returns 404 - pre-existing issue, not related to current changes. Error is silently caught so no functional impact.

critical_code_review_comments: BulkCache implementation in server.py (lines 29-49) correctly supports per-key TTL via _ttl field
Cached proxy endpoints (lines 877-938) properly implement 5-min TTL for external API calls
SeoHead.jsx TDZ fix verified - canonical variable now declared before ogImage which uses it
Models.jsx image preloading (lines 104-107) implemented correctly for background loading
context_for_next_testing_agent: In-memory caching for external API proxy endpoints working with 5-min TTL. BulkCache class supports per-key TTL via _ttl field in entry dict. settings/bulk now returns _stock_saunas array and _catalog_available boolean. StockSaunas.jsx uses stockSaunas from SettingsContext instead of separate fetch. SeoHead.jsx TDZ bug fixed (canonical moved before ogImage). Models.jsx preloads model images in background. Minor pre-existing issue: /api/content/calculator endpoint returns 404 but error is silently caught.

sauna_public_models_caching.details: GET /api/sauna/public-models returns models data. Second call uses in-memory cache (5-min TTL). Response includes models array with id, name, imageUrl, variants, etc.

sauna_prices_caching.details: GET /api/sauna/prices returns prices data. Second call uses in-memory cache (5-min TTL). Response includes categories with options and prices.

settings_bulk_stock_saunas.details: GET /api/settings/bulk includes _stock_saunas array. StockSaunas.jsx component uses this data from SettingsContext instead of making separate API call.

settings_bulk_catalog_available.details: GET /api/settings/bulk includes _catalog_available boolean indicating if catalog.pdf exists.

sauny_page_loading.details: /sauny page loads correctly with hero section, models section with 3 category cards (Beczki, Kwadro, Wiking). Page title renders correctly via SeoHead.jsx.

balie_page_loading.details: /balie page loads without console errors. All 5 color tabs (Fiberglass, Acrylic, Spruce, Thermo, WPC) present and switch correctly.

seohead_tdz_fix.details: No ReferenceError about 'h' before initialization. SeoHead.jsx renders correctly on both /sauny and /balie pages.

admin_export_auth.details: GET /api/admin/export returns 401 without auth, 200 with valid Basic auth (admin/220066).
